documentation:
Used for legacy Emerson Liebert CW CRAHs
modbusReg_AirTempSP either 40020 or 40023 depending on model
name: Emerson_CW_Modbus_v3

tags.documentation: Mode is Hand (supersedes Maintenance, Override, Program, Operator)
tags.name: Sts_Hand

tags.documentation: Motor requested to stop and is confirmed stopped
tags.name: Sts_Stopped

tags.documentation: 1= Normal Ops, 2= Start up, 8= Normal with Warning, 16=Normal with Alarm, 32= Abnormal Operation
tags.expression:
Case({[.]System_Status},
1, "Normal Operation",
2, "Start up",
8, "Normal with Warning",
16, "Normal with Alarm",
32, "Abnormal Operation",
"Unknown"
)
tags.name: System_Operating_Status

tags.documentation: Motor requested to run and awaiting run feedback
tags.name: Sts_Starting

tags.documentation: Motor requested to stop and awaiting stopped feedback
tags.name: Sts_Stopping

tags.documentation: Operator command to reset all alarms requiring reset
tags.name: OCmd_Reset

tags.documentation: Requested to run and is confirmed running
tags.name: Sts_Running

tags.documentation: 1 = Normal Operation, 2 = StartUp, 8 = Normal with Warning, 16 = Normal with Alarm, 32 = Abnormal
tags.name: System_Status

tags.documentation: Mode is Operator (manual) AND CmdSrc.OCmd_Oper-Operator command to acquire from Program
tags.name: Sts_Oper
